items.summary: Fix the Internet Identity session persistence so that already-authenticated users are not prompted to log in again on page load or navigation. The identity must be restored from the persisted delegation chain without requiring a new login flow.

Fix access denied errors for authenticated users: after session is successfully restored, role-based access checks (admin and regular user) must correctly recognize the restored identity principal and grant appropriate permissions without requiring a fresh login.

Ensure the LoginPage redirect logic does not re-trigger for users who are already authenticated: if a user navigates to /login while already logged in, they should be immediately redirected to the appropriate page (admin panel or dashboard) without showing the login prompt.
